mapper.insert: insert into log_archive_records ( archive_type, window_start_time, window_end_time, source_index_pattern, storage_provider, bucket_name, object_key, archive_status, retry_count, failure_reason, started_time, completed_time ) values ( #{archiveType}, #{windowStartTime}, #{windowEndTime}, #{sourceIndexPattern}, #{storageProvider}, #{bucketName}, #{objectKey}, #{archiveStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{failureReason}, #{startedTime}, #{completedTime} ) on conflict on constraint uk_log_archive_record_window do nothing
mapper.select: select archive_id as archiveId, archive_type as archiveType, window_start_time as windowStartTime, window_end_time as windowEndTime, source_index_pattern as sourceIndexPattern, storage_provider as storageProvider, bucket_name as bucketName, object_key as objectKey, archive_status as archiveStatus, retry_count as retryCount, failure_reason as failureReason, started_time as startedTime, completed_time as completedTime from log_archive_records where archive_status = 'PENDING' and is_delete = 0 order by window_start_time asc limit 1
mapper.update: update log_archive_records set archive_status = 'RUNNING', started_time = #{startedTime}, failure_reason = null, updated_time = now() where archive_id = #{archiveId} and archive_status = 'PENDING' and is_delete = 0

update log_archive_records set archive_status = 'SUCCESS', completed_time = #{completedTime}, failure_reason = null, updated_time = now() where archive_id = #{archiveId} and archive_status = 'RUNNING' and is_delete = 0

update log_archive_records set archive_status = 'FAILED', retry_count = retry_count + 1, failure_reason = #{failureReason}, completed_time = #{completedTime}, updated_time = now() where archive_id = #{archiveId} and archive_status = 'RUNNING' and is_delete = 0
